title: Air-Fried Crispy Moroccan Fennel Stir-fry
description: A tangy and silky Moroccan-inspired dish featuring fennel that is both crowd-pleasing and suitable for those with dietary restrictions.
instructions: Trim the fennel bulb and cut into thin slices. Peel and chop the onion.
In a skillet, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add onions and sauté until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add garlic cloves and cook for an additional minute or until fragrant.
Stir in tomato paste and spices (paprika, cumin seeds, and optionally cayenne pepper). Cook for another 1-2 minutes.
Gently fold in fennel slices. Cook uncovered on medium-high heat for about 5-7 minutes or until the fennel is lightly browned and crisp.
Serve immediately as a snack or side dish.
